languages.text: {n}Имплантационный трон предстает перед вами во всей красе, осиянный разрядами Движущей Силы. На его ложе распростерто чье-то мощное тело, в котором лишь с большим трудом можно опознать Эоганна.{/n}

{n}The implantation throne stands before you in all its glory, illuminated with discharges of the Motive Force. A massive body is laid out upon it, and it takes you a moment to recognise it as Eogunn.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Имплантационный трон предстает перед вами во всей красе, осиянный разрядами Движущей Силы. На его ложе распростерто чье-то мощное тело, в котором лишь с большим трудом можно опознать Эоганна.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The implantation throne stands before you in all its glory, illuminated with discharges of the Motive Force. A massive body is laid out upon it, and it takes you a moment to recognise it as Eogunn.{/n}

{n}The implantation throne stands before you in all its glory, illuminated with discharges of the Motive Force. A massive body is laid out upon it, and it takes you a moment to recognise it as Eogunn.{/n}

{n}The implantation throne stands before you in all its glory, illuminated with discharges of the Motive Force. A massive body is laid out upon it, and it takes you a moment to recognise it as Eogunn.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Implantationsthron steht von Entladungen der Antriebskraft erhellt in seiner ganzen Pracht vor dir. Auf ihm liegt ein schwerer Körper, den du erst nach einiger Zeit als Eogunn erkennst.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The implantation throne stands before you in all its glory, illuminated with discharges of the Motive Force. A massive body is laid out upon it, and it takes you a moment to recognise it as Eogunn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Implantationsthron steht von Entladungen der Antriebskraft erhellt in seiner ganzen Pracht vor dir. Auf ihm liegt ein schwerer Körper, den du erst nach einiger Zeit als Eogunn erkennst.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le fauteuil d'implantation se dresse devant vous dans toute sa splendeur, illuminé par des décharges de Force Motrice. Un corps imposant y est assis, et il vous faut quelques instants pour reconnaître Eogunn.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The implantation throne stands before you in all its glory, illuminated with discharges of the Motive Force. A massive body is laid out upon it, and it takes you a moment to recognise it as Eogunn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le fauteuil d'implantation se dresse devant vous dans toute sa splendeur, illuminé par des décharges de Force Motrice. Un corps imposant y est assis, et il vous faut quelques instants pour reconnaître Eogunn.{/n}

languages.text: {n}移植王座在你面前庄严矗立，被源力的电流照亮。一具庞大的躯体横陈其上，你花了片刻才认出那正是伊奥贡。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The implantation throne stands before you in all its glory, illuminated with discharges of the Motive Force. A massive body is laid out upon it, and it takes you a moment to recognise it as Eogunn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}移植王座在你面前庄严矗立，被源力的电流照亮。一具庞大的躯体横陈其上，你花了片刻才认出那正是伊奥贡。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tienes delante el trono de implantación en todo su esplendor, iluminado por descargas de la Fuerza Motriz. Un enorme cuerpo yace sobre él, y tardas un momento en reconocer que se trata de Eogunn.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The implantation throne stands before you in all its glory, illuminated with discharges of the Motive Force. A massive body is laid out upon it, and it takes you a moment to recognise it as Eogunn.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tienes delante el trono de implantación en todo su esplendor, iluminado por descargas de la Fuerza Motriz. Un enorme cuerpo yace sobre él, y tardas un momento en reconocer que se trata de Eogunn.{/n}

languages.text: {n}インプラントの玉座が栄光のうちにあなたの前に現れ、推進力の放電で輝く。インプラントの玉座が、推進力の放電で光り輝きながら、栄光のうちにあなたの前に現れる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Implant Throne appears before you in all its glory, glowing with discharges of the Propulsion Force. The Implant Throne appears in its glory, glowing with discharges of Propulsion Force.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İmplantasyon tahtı; Devinim Gücü salınımlarıyla aydınlatılmış hâlde, tüm görkemiyle karşında duruyor. Üzerine devasa bir beden uzanmış, bunun Eogunn olduğunu hemen anlıyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The implantation throne stands before you in all its glory, illuminated with discharges of the Motive Force. A massive body is laid out upon it, and it takes you a moment to recognise it as Eogunn.{/n}
